summary: Backend testing for Iteration 2 (Precificação/Procedures module). Added 8 new pytest cases under TestProcedures covering POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/procedures, calculation correctness (items_cost, indirect_value, total_cost, margin_value, suggested_price, final_price), manual_price override behavior, empty items edge case, _id leak check, and 404 paths. Regression: all 27 previous tests still pass. Total: 35/35 passing (100%).

minor.issue: No validation that indirect_cost_pct and margin_pct are non-negative; negative values would yield negative prices.
No uniqueness/sanity check on procedure name; duplicates allowed.
Body uses ProcedureCreate (no partial-update / PATCH support). Caller must always re-send full payload including items array.

action_items: (Optional) Validate indirect_cost_pct >= 0 and margin_pct >= 0 in ProcedureCreate.
(Optional) Integration test of Sales-from-Procedure flow (when frontend loads procedure items as sale lines) once frontend is in scope.
(Optional) Consider exposing per-item subtotal in enrich_procedure for richer UI rendering.
critical_code_review_comments: enrich_procedure correctly removes nothing extra but server.py POST /api/procedures uses doc.pop('_id', None) after insert_one — good fix preventing ObjectId leak (validated by test_create_procedure_with_calculations and test_list_procedures_returns_calculated_fields).
GET /api/procedures and PUT use projection {'_id': 0} consistently — good.
DRY: enrich_procedure is reused by list/create/update — good.

Procedures endpoints do NOT use response_model (unlike products/patients) — intentional because computed fields are added at runtime. Acceptable but consider a ProcedureRead model for OpenAPI clarity.

No integration yet between /api/sales and /api/procedures: frontend is expected to expand procedure items into SaleItem array client-side. Backend has no /api/sales/from-procedure helper — by design per the problem statement, but worth confirming.
seed_data_creation: TEST_-prefixed procedures are created and then deleted in each test. Pre-existing 'Perfuração Baby' procedure is not touched. All cleanup happens within test methods.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints (products, patients, appointments, sales, payment-methods, dashboard, reminders, reports/monthly, procedures) are fully tested in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. The new TestProcedures class verifies the precificação math exhaustively. No regressions introduced.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. The previously reported bug (MongoDB _id leak in POST /api/procedures) is now fixed via doc.pop('_id', None) after insert_one and is verified by explicit '_id' not in response asserts in 3 procedure tests.
